query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `founder_income_streams` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `incomeType` enum('trust_distribution','llc_distribution_laws_collective','llc_distribution_laws_llc','llc_distribution_real_eye','token_earnings','consulting_fees','ip_royalties','grant_stipend') NOT NULL,
  `sourceEntity` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL,
  `currency` varchar(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  `periodStart` date,
  `periodEnd` date,
  `taxCategory` enum('trust_income','pass_through_k1','self_employment','royalty_income','w2_wages','1099_contractor'),
  `taxYear` int,
  `documentationRef` varchar(255),
  `invoiceNumber` varchar(50),
  `status` enum('projected','pending','received','reconciled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `receivedAt` timestamp,
  `ledgerTransactionId` int,
  `blockchainHash` varchar(255),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `founder_income_streams_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `founder_token_earnings` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `tokenType` enum('MIRROR','GIFT','SPARK','HOUSE','CROWN') NOT NULL,
  `amount` int NOT NULL,
  `activityType` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `activityDescription` text,
  `converted` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `conversionDate` timestamp,
  `cashValue` decimal(18,2),
  `conversionRate` decimal(10,4),
  `incomeStreamId` int,
  `blockchainHash` varchar(255),
  `earnedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `founder_token_earnings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `founder_consulting_engagements` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `clientEntity` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `serviceType` enum('strategic_advisory','training_delivery','grant_consulting','community_engagement','curriculum_development','other') NOT NULL,
  `serviceDescription` text,
  `billingType` enum('hourly','project','retainer','per_event') NOT NULL,
  `hourlyRate` decimal(10,2),
  `projectFee` decimal(10,2),
  `hoursWorked` decimal(8,2),
  `invoiceNumber` varchar(50),
  `invoiceDate` date,
  `dueDate` date,
  `totalAmount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('draft','invoiced','paid','overdue','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `paidAt` timestamp,
  `incomeStreamId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `founder_consulting_engagements_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `founder_ip_licenses` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `ipType` enum('curriculum','brand_trademark','systems_processes','content','other') NOT NULL,
  `ipName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `ipDescription` text,
  `licenseeEntity` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `licenseType` enum('exclusive','non_exclusive','limited') NOT NULL,
  `startDate` date NOT NULL,
  `endDate` date,
  `autoRenew` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `royaltyType` enum('flat_annual','per_use','percentage','per_student') NOT NULL,
  `royaltyRate` decimal(10,4),
  `flatFee` decimal(18,2),
  `status` enum('active','expired','terminated','pending') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `founder_ip_licenses_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `founder_income_summary` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `year` int NOT NULL,
  `quarter` int,
  `month` int,
  `trustDistributions` decimal(18,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `llcDistributions` decimal(18,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `tokenEarnings` decimal(18,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `consultingFees` decimal(18,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `ipRoyalties` decimal(18,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `grantStipends` decimal(18,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `totalIncome` decimal(18,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `estimatedSelfEmploymentTax` decimal(18,2),
  `estimatedIncomeTax` decimal(18,2),
  `status` enum('projected','actual','reconciled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'projected',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `founder_income_summary_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `clientEntity` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `serviceType` enum('strategic_advisory','training_delivery','grant_consulting','community_engagement','curriculum_development','other') NOT NULL,
  `serviceDescription` text,
  `billingType` enum('hourly','project','retainer','per_event') NOT NULL,
  `hourlyRate` decimal(10,2),
  `projectFee` decimal(10,2),
  `hoursWorked` decimal(8,2),
  `invoiceNumber` varchar(50),
  `invoiceDate` date,
  `dueDate` date,
  `totalAmount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('draft','invoiced','paid','overdue','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `paidAt` timestamp,
  `incomeStreamId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `founder_consulting_engagements_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `founder_ip_licenses` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `ipType` enum('curriculum','brand_trademark','systems_processes','content','other') NOT NULL,
  `ipName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `ipDescription` text,
  `licenseeEntity` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `licenseType` enum('exclusive','non_exclusive','limited') NOT NULL,
  `startDate` date NOT NULL,
  `endDate` date,
  `autoRenew` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `royaltyType` enum('flat_annual','per_use','percentage','per_student') NOT NULL,
  `royaltyRate` decimal(10,4),
  `flatFee` decimal(18,2),
  `status` enum('active','expired','terminated','pending') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `founder_ip_licenses_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `founder_income_summary` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `year` int NOT NULL,
  `quarter` int,
  `month` int,
  `trustDistributions` decimal(18,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `llcDistributions` decimal(18,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `tokenEarnings` decimal(18,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `consultingFees` decimal(18,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `ipRoyalties` decimal(18,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `grantStipends` decimal(18,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `totalIncome` decimal(18,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `estimatedSelfEmploymentTax` decimal(18,2),
  `estimatedIncomeTax` decimal(18,2),
  `status` enum('projected','actual','reconciled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'projected',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `founder_income_summary_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
